notetext.name: EchoAgent
notetext.description: Echo back the provided text. Useful for testing the agent dispatch path.

notetext.name: CalculatorAgent
notetext.description: Evaluate a basic arithmetic expression (e.g. '2 + 2 * 3') and return the result.

notetext.content: RAPP runs on out-of-the-box Dataverse with no custom tables or solution import.
Shared memory is stored as annotations regarding the 'RAPP System' account.
Ada prefers concise answers and British spelling.
